strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure with real-world deployment (e.g., GISCollective, DLang services)
Hands-on exposure to agentic workflows via MCP code generators and AI-agent tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, CI/CD setup, and cross-team mentoring across multiple organizations
concerns: No explicit evidence of designing or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lack of demonstrated experience with real-time credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or financial compliance infrastructure
Limited visibility into scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or governing hybrid external engineering models
response.justification: The candidate brings strong engineering craftsmanship, event-driven system design, and emerging agentic tooling experience, but lacks direct evidence of fintech infrastructure, regulated AI deployment, or scaling leadership at the executive level required for this role.
